extraction.one_line_summary: VALVERDE Alejandro attacked under the red flame (1km to go), dropped MARTIN Dan on final gradient to Ans for fourth Liege victory
tactical_patterns: Key selection happened on Côte de la Roche-aux-Faucons 35km out, not final climbs—Wellins bridged solo from favorites group.
Formolo attacked before red flame but was caught, revealing final kilometer timing beats early moves on Ans gradient.
Movistar chased breakaway alone from Côte de Boheau (sixth climb), showing other favorites' teams unwilling to share workload early.

rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: positive: bridged solo from favorites group on Roche-aux-Faucons, showing unexpected diesel strength at 35km out
rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: negative: led under red flame but cracked on final Ans gradient, revealing insufficient explosive finishing power
rider_signals.ROSSETTO Stéphane: neutral: Cofidis committed two riders to breakaway but caught on Roche-aux-Faucons, standard French team pattern
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: stayed with favorites until final kilometer but dropped on Ans gradient, lacks Valverde's finishing punch
